case_title: RODRIGO JASSO VS. LOKAL LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JASSO, RODRIGO AS TO DEFENDANT LOKAL LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA RADIUS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
